summary: US-Iran conflict: Iran declared Strait of Hormuz closed (March 4), restricting ~20M barrels/day (~27% global maritime petroleum). Peace talks stalled — Trump scrapped envoy missions. Iran offered new proposal but nuclear talks deferred. Goldman Sachs raised Brent crude forecast to $90/bbl by late 2026. Market torn between geopolitical risk and AI tailwind.
